name: OM SYSTEM OM-1 Mark II Mirrorless Camera Body Only
description: The first flagship to carry the OM SYSTEM name, the OM-1 Mark II is a revamped second iteration of the proven Micro Four Thirds mirrorless camera. Its 20MP stacked BSI Live MOS sensor and TruePic X processor deliver high-quality captures, speedy autofocus

features.Key Features: 20MP Stacked BSI Live MOS MFT Sensor | DCI/UHD 4K 60p 12-Bit Video Recording | 10 fps Shooting, 120 fps with E. Shutter | Cross Quad Pixel Phase-Detection AF | 5.76m-Dot OLED Electronic Viewfinder | 3.0" 1.62m-Dot Swivel Touchscreen LCD | 5-Axis In-Body Image Stabilization | High-Res Shot, Live ND & Composite Modes | IP53 Weather-Sealed & Freezeproof Design | Dual UHS-II SD Card Slots
features.What’s In The Box: OM SYSTEM OM-1 Mark II Mirrorless Camera (Body Only) | OM SYSTEM CB-USB13 USB Connection Cable | OM SYSTEM BLX-1 Lithium-Ion Battery (7.2V, 2280mAh) | OM SYSTEM F-7AC USB-AC Adapter | Shoulder Strap | FL-LM3 Flash
